lines: Turkey beat the United States 3-2 yesterday.
The Indiana Fever are 10-8, third in the Eastern Conference and host the Los Angeles Sparks tomorrow at 8:00 PM ET.
The Indianapolis Indians lost 6-4 to the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders yesterday, falling to 32-46.
The Indianapolis Indians host the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders tonight at 7:05 PM ET.
escape_hatch: I mostly just catch the highlights, honestly.

speech: Here's the sports talk for Indianapolis, Friday, June 26. Turkey beat the United States 3 to 2 yesterday. The Indiana Fever are 10 to 8, third in the Eastern Conference and host the Los Angeles Sparks tomorrow at 8:00 PM ET. The Indianapolis Indians lost 6 to 4 to the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders yesterday, falling to 32 to 46. The Indianapolis Indians host the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders tonight at 7:05 PM ET. And if it gets away from you, your out is: I mostly just catch the highlights, honestly.
